art_highlights: Global Art Market Report 2026: Sales increased by 4% to $59.6B in 2025; 'Cautious Optimism' for 2026.
Market shows a 'barbell' structure with strength at ultra-high end and lower-priced segments.
Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 (March 27-29) features 242 galleries and new 'Echoes' sector; expected to influence spring auction sentiment.
Generational shift: New collectors (49% of 2025 gallery clients) are increasingly digitally-native.
Asia Pacific market: Nuanced recovery; China/HK remain central despite 2025 volatility; inter-Asia projects a key 2026 trend.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Positive momentum building for Q2 2026; high-value auction segment stabilizing the market.
market_summary.key_drivers: Strong auction rebound, generational buyer shifts, and major regional events like Art Basel HK acting as confidence indicators.
market_summary.trend: Market concentration in top-tier tiers (>$10M) and entry-level (<$50K), with middle market facing ongoing headwinds.
